title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Harmonies: Crescendo**
*2026*
Sanctuaries with new personal game boards and whisper creatures.
![Harmonies: Crescendo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_e7dc1cb2.jpg)

2. **Entropy**
*2026*
Create stars, form planets, and guide life from microbes to animals.
![Entropy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_eecc8501.jpg)

3. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_91d54f53.jpg)

4. **Harmonies: Pulse**
*2026*
A small expansion for Harmonies that makes descision making even more challenging.
![Harmonies: Pulse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_d44e10d1.png)

5. **Altera**
*2027*
Rival factions settle their differences in a grand festival.
![Altera](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_62de5a07.png)

6. **Revenant**
*2026*
Evacuate a besieged starfleet, navigating external threats and internal allegiances.
![Revenant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_8f93f34a.jpg)

7. **SHUG**
*2027*
Roam Ol Engoland, gather monsters, on your quest to find Shug and topple the tyrant.
![SHUG](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_b2b3be74.jpg)

8. **The Old Prince 1871**
*2022*
Entanglement, forced compromises & variously (un)welcome "friends".
![The Old Prince 1871](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_304e90c7.png)

9. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_b40d7d22.jpg)

10. **Drillers**
*2026*
Mine for minerals, upgrade your deck and manage your resources carefully.
![Drillers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_19ec95a2.jpg)

11. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_49e0b109.jpg)

12. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_c8aeca00.jpg)

13. **Concordia: Special Edition**
*2027*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia: Special Edition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_592963f3.jpg)

14. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_cbfd777d.jpg)

15. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_ae82ec23.png)

16. **8 Dragons**
*2027*
Fly across the kingdoms, gather treasures, and form a legendary dragon swarm.
![8 Dragons](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_bd43750c.jpg)

17. **Dune: Imperium**
*2020*
Influence, intrigue, and combat in the universe of Dune.
![Dune: Imperium](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_892a4dcc.jpg)

18. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_3ee6a208.jpg)

19. **Survivalist**
*2026*
Gather and craft to survive eight days in the wilderness!
![Survivalist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_92da2c4e.png)

20. **Stonespine Architects: Invasion**
*2027*
Train a boss monster to defend against invading heroes.
![Stonespine Architects: Invasion](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_4f9599d7.jpg)

21. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_29f03c18.jpg)

22. **Stonespine Architects**
*2024*
Build your own perilous dungeon and become a master architect.
![Stonespine Architects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_f57d06c0.jpg)

23. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_2e9ff018.jpg)

24. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_cdf8f305.png)

25. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_6576e133.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*17 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_846f275c.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*25 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_e662aa8b.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*53 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_18dff7c6.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*20 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_4238ac26.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*89 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_bc7bedd2.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*103 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_2e0d82c8.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*13 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_049f69ab.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*116 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_c05c2d97.jpg)

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*35 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_a268763f.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*42 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_63ff6ab5.jpg)

11. **Cascadia**
*58 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_db5e8b17.jpg)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*32 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_1c24ba24.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*4 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_d3d04888.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*25 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_2c981cf9.png)

15. **The Gang**
*11 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_ece62eda.jpg)

16. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*65 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_11154829.jpg)

17. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*18 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_f01bba00.jpg)

18. **Sky Team**
*32 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_9839be97.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*4 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_f71a5de8.png)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*11 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_aceffcbd.jpg)

21. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*5 months on the list*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_d0d62baf.png)

22. **Carcassonne**
*275 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_2afe316a.jpg)

23. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*1 months on the list*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_8a80e1ef.jpg)

24. **Toy Battle**
*3 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_518d49d0.jpg)

25. **SCOUT**
*42 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-19/toplist/bgg_0167ae16.png)
